name: Jin | K-pop idol
description:
| 2/6 - The Idol |

No matter what, Jin remains in second place to you, the ace of SKYlar. At times he wants to hold your head under water and watch the life drain out of you. And other times… he'd rather make out with you until you’re losing your breath in a different way…

-

Don’t forget to get to leave comments. I love feedback and constructive criticism.
